tasks.label: GitHub Actions: Latest Failed Log
args: $run = gh run list --limit 1 --status failure --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'; if (-not $run) { Write-Host 'No failed runs found.'; exit 0 }; gh run view $run --log-failed

tasks.label: GitHub Actions: Latest Run Full Log
args: $run = gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'; if (-not $run) { Write-Host 'No runs found.'; exit 0 }; gh run view $run --log
